goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 + (x1 + x2) = x0 + x1 + x2 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k1, k2)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k0, k1), k2) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k3: Nat, k4: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k3, k4)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, k3), k4) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k7: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w1, k7)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, w1), k7) } }
let w10: Nat satisfy { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w1, w10)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, w1), w10) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x0, x1), x2) = lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x1, x2)) }(w0, w1, w10)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k1, k0) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k0, k1) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k2, w0) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, k2) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w1, w0) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, w1) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x0, x1) = lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x1, x0) }(w1, w0)
exists(k0: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], k0) != k0 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], w0) != w0 }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] != x0 or lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x1, x0) = x1 }(lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], w0)
(forall(x0: Nat) { x0 + Nat.0 = x0 })
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x0, x1) = lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x1, x0) }(w0, lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat])
exists(k0: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k0, lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat]) != k0 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat]) != w0 }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] != x0 or lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x1, x0) = x1 }(lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], w0)
(forall(x0: Nat) { x0 + Nat.0 = x0 })

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 * (x1 + x2) = x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k1, k2)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k0, k1), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k0, k2)) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k3: Nat, k4: Nat) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k3, k4)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, k3), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, k4)) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k7: Nat) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w1, k7)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, w1), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, k7)) } }
let w10: Nat satisfy { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w1, w10)) != lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, w1), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, w10)) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x0, x1), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x0, x2)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x0, lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x1, x2)) }(w0, w1, w10)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { (x0 + x1) * x2 = x0 * x2 + x1 * x2 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k0, k2), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k1, k2)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](k0, k1), k2) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k3: Nat, k4: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, k4), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k3, k4)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, k3), k4) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k7: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, k7), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w1, k7)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, w1), k7) } }
let w10: Nat satisfy { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, w10), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w1, w10)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](w0, w1), w10) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(add).Add.add[Nat](lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x0, x1), lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x2, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(add).Add.add[Nat](x0, x2), x1) }(w0, w10, w1)
exists(k0: Nat) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](k0, lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat]) != lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] }
let w0: Nat satisfy { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](w0, lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat]) != lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { Nat.zero != x0 or lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x1, x0) = lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] }(lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], w0)
(forall(x0: Nat) { x0 * Nat.zero = Nat.0 })
exists(k0: Nat) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], k0) != lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] }
let w0: Nat satisfy { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], w0) != lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x0, x1) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x1, x0) }(w0, lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat])
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { Nat.zero != x0 or lib(mul).Mul.mul[Nat](x1, x0) = lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat] }(lib(zero).Zero.0[Nat], w0)
(forall(x0: Nat) { x0 * Nat.zero = Nat.0 })

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { k1 * k0 != k0 * k1 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { k0 * w0 != w0 * k0 } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { w1 * w0 != w0 * w1 }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w2 * w0 != w0 * w2 }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(w0, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2 implies x0 <= x1.meet(x2) }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0 <= k1 and k0 <= k2 and not k0 <= k1.meet(k2) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0 <= k0 and w0 <= k1 and not w0 <= k0.meet(k1) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0 <= w1 and w0 <= k2 and not w0 <= w1.meet(k2) } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0 <= w1 and w0 <= w2 and not w0 <= w1.meet(w2) }
w0 <= w1 and w0 <= w2
not w0 <= w1.meet(w2)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x0 <= x2 or x0 <= x1.meet(x2) }(w0, w1, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.meet(x1) <= x0 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { not k0.meet(k1) <= k0 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { not w0.meet(k0) <= w0 } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { not w0.meet(w1) <= w0 }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.meet(x1) <= x0 }(w0, w1)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.meet(x1) <= x1 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { not k0.meet(k1) <= k1 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { not w0.meet(k0) <= k0 } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { not w0.meet(w1) <= w1 }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.meet(x1) <= x1 }(w0, w1)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 <= x2 and x1 <= x2 implies x0.join(x1) <= x2 }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0 <= k2 and k1 <= k2 and not k0.join(k1) <= k2 }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0 <= k1 and k0 <= k1 and not w0.join(k0) <= k1 } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0 <= k2 and w1 <= k2 and not w0.join(w1) <= k2 } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0 <= w2 and w1 <= w2 and not w0.join(w1) <= w2 }
w0 <= w2 and w1 <= w2
not w0.join(w1) <= w2
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x2 <= x1 or x0.join(x2) <= x1 }(w0, w2, w1)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x0.join(x1) }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { not k0 <= k0.join(k1) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { not w0 <= w0.join(k0) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { not w0 <= w0.join(w1) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x0.join(x1) }(w0, w1)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x1 <= x0.join(x1) }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { not k1 <= k0.join(k1) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { not k0 <= w0.join(k0) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { not w1 <= w0.join(w1) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 <= x1.join(x0) }(w1, w0)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.join(x1.meet(x2)) = x0.join(x1).meet(x0.join(x2)) }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0.join(k1.meet(k2)) != k0.join(k1).meet(k0.join(k2)) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0.join(k0.meet(k1)) != w0.join(k0).meet(w0.join(k1)) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0.join(w1.meet(k2)) != w0.join(w1).meet(w0.join(k2)) } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0.join(w1.meet(w2)) != w0.join(w1).meet(w0.join(w2)) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.join(x1).meet(x0.join(x2)) = x0.join(x1.meet(x2)) }(w0, w1, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.meet(x1.join(x2)) = x0.meet(x1).join(x0.meet(x2)) }

p.c: exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat, k2: Nat) { k0.meet(k1.join(k2)) != k0.meet(k1).join(k0.meet(k2)) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { w0.meet(k0.join(k1)) != w0.meet(k0).join(w0.meet(k1)) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { exists(k2: Nat) { w0.meet(w1.join(k2)) != w0.meet(w1).join(w0.meet(k2)) } }
let w2: Nat satisfy { w0.meet(w1.join(w2)) != w0.meet(w1).join(w0.meet(w2)) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0.meet(x1).join(x0.meet(x2)) = x0.meet(x1.join(x2)) }(w0, w1, w2)
